title: They Were Trying
caption: Rosie was excellent at tracking. The trail led through a gap in a fence to a neglected vacant lot — and there, in one corner, someone had been trying very hard. Freshly turned soil. Makeshift stakes and string. A few pale seedlings, barely alive. But trying.
story_notes: Following the footprints leads to a vacant lot where a child has been attempting to grow a secret garden. The seedlings are struggling but alive.
